text:
how about nested channels; what would those look like? I'm thinking <channel id="/tenex-edge/dev" name="#dev"> [...] Nested channels would remain structurally nested while every node carries a standalone absolute ID:

```xml
<workspace channel="/tenex-edge/dev">
  <channels>
    <channel id="/tenex-edge/dev" name="#dev">
      <presence>
        <session name="@ivy-codex" status="implementing channel paths" />
      </presence>

      <channel id="/tenex-edge/dev/api" name="#api">
        <channel id="/tenex-edge/dev/api/auth" name="#auth" />
      </channel>
    </channel>
  </channels>
</workspace>
```
